message:
🐛 Remove GPU compositing triggers that cause screen-sharing flickering (#801)

Eliminates backdrop-filter, will-change, translateZ(0), and box-shadow
glow effects that create GPU compositing layers. Screen capture software
(Teams/Zoom) must re-render these layers every frame, causing visible
flickering even when the UI is static.

Changes:
- Remove backdrop-filter: blur(12px) from .glass class
- Globally disable all backdrop-blur-* Tailwind classes
- Increase glass background opacity (0.8→0.92 dark, 0.9→0.95 light)
- Remove will-change from card-refresh-pulse, spinner, spin animations
- Remove translateZ(0) GPU layer promotion hacks
- Remove box-shadow glow from status indicators
- Remove backdrop-filter from session-expired banner

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
